creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
curl.h needs to include <sys/select.h> for fd_set on FreeBSD < 8.x. I figured
it out because i had problems to build xmlrpc-c-devel recent versions.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-include__curl__curl.h

Port maintainer (roam@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
